documents.title: Mentor Matching Policy
documents.snippet: Only background-check-cleared mentors may be assigned to students. Match on subject need first, then language and campus proximity.

documents.title: Caseload Guidelines
documents.snippet: No mentor should exceed 5 active mentees. Prioritize high-urgency students (attendance + failing grade) for the next open slot.

documents.title: Outreach Tone Guide
documents.snippet: Intro messages should be warm and specific: name the student, the subject, the proposed time, and a single confirm action.
